texts.1:28:15-15: And, behold, I am with thee, and will keep thee, whithersoever thou goest, and will bring thee again into this land. For I will not leave thee, until I have done that which I have spoken to thee of.
texts.1:50:20-20: And as for you, ye meant evil against me; but God meant it for good, to bring to pass, as it is this day, to save much people alive.
texts.10:22:29-29: For thou art my lamp, O Jehovah; And Jehovah will lighten my darkness.
texts.10:22:31-31: As for God, his way is perfect: The word of Jehovah is tried; He is a shield unto all them that take refuge in him.
texts.13:16:11-11: Seek ye Jehovah and his strength; Seek his face evermore.
texts.13:16:34-34: O give thanks unto Jehovah; for he is good; For his lovingkindness endureth for ever.
texts.14:15:7-7: But be ye strong, and let not your hands be slack; for your work shall be rewarded.
texts.16:8:10-10: Then he said unto them, Go your way, eat the fat, and drink the sweet, and send portions unto him for whom nothing is prepared; for this day is holy unto our Lord: neither be ye grieved; for the joy of Jehovah is your strength.
texts.17:4:14-14: For if thou altogether holdest thy peace at this time, then will relief and deliverance arise to the Jews from another place, but thou and thy fathers house will perish: and who knoweth whether thou art not come to the kingdom for such a time as this?
texts.18:19:25-25: But as for me I know that my Redeemer liveth, And at last he will stand up upon the earth:
texts.18:23:10-10: But he knoweth the way that I take; When he hath tried me, I shall come forth as gold.
texts.18:42:2-2: I know that thou canst do all things, And that no purpose of thine can be restrained.
texts.18:8:21-21: He will yet fill thy mouth with laughter, And thy lips with shouting.
texts.19:1:1-2: Blessed is the man that walketh not in the counsel of the wicked, Nor standeth in the way of sinners, Nor sitteth in the seat of scoffers: But his delight is in the law of Jehovah; And on his law doth he meditate day and night.
texts.19:100:4-5: Enter into his gates with thanksgiving, And into his courts with praise: Give thanks unto him, and bless his name. For Jehovah is good; his lovingkindness endureth for ever, And his faithfulness unto all generations. Psalm 101 A Psalm of David.
texts.19:103:1-2: Bless Jehovah, O my soul; And all that is within me, bless his holy name. Bless Jehovah, O my soul, And forget not all his benefits:
texts.19:103:11-12: For as the heavens are high above the earth, So great is his lovingkindness toward them that fear him. As far as the east is from the west, So far hath he removed our transgressions from us.
texts.19:103:13-13: Like as a father pitieth his children, So Jehovah pitieth them that fear him.
texts.19:103:8-8: Jehovah is merciful and gracious, Slow to anger, and abundant in lovingkindness.
texts.19:104:33-34: I will sing unto Jehovah as long as I live: I will sing praise to my God while I have any being. Let thy meditation be sweet unto him: I will rejoice in Jehovah.
texts.19:105:1-2: Oh give thanks unto Jehovah, call upon his name; Make known among the peoples his doings. Sing unto him, sing praises unto him; Talk ye of all his marvelous works.
texts.19:107:1-1: O give thanks unto Jehovah; For he is good; For his lovingkindness endureth for ever.
texts.19:107:8-9: Oh that men would praise Jehovah for his lovingkindness, And for his wonderful works to the children of men! For he satisfieth the longing soul, And the hungry soul he filleth with good.
texts.19:108:3-4: I will give thanks unto thee, O Jehovah, among the peoples; And I will sing praises unto thee among the nations. For thy lovingkindness is great above the heavens; And thy truth reacheth unto the skies.
texts.19:111:1-2: Praise ye Jehovah. I will give thanks unto Jehovah with my whole heart, In the council of the upright, and in the congregation. The works of Jehovah are great, Sought out of all them that have pleasure therein.
texts.19:112:4-4: Unto the upright there ariseth light in the darkness: He is gracious, and merciful, and righteous.
texts.19:112:7-7: He shall not be afraid of evil tidings: His heart is fixed, trusting in Jehovah.
texts.19:113:3-3: From the rising of the sun unto the going down of the same Jehovahs name is to be praised.
texts.19:115:11-11: Ye that fear Jehovah, trust in Jehovah: He is their help and their shield.
texts.19:116:1-2: I love Jehovah, because he heareth My voice and my supplications. Because he hath inclined his ear unto me, Therefore will I call upon him as long as I live.
texts.19:116:7-7: Return unto thy rest, O my soul; For Jehovah hath dealt bountifully with thee.
texts.19:118:1-1: Oh give thanks unto Jehovah; for he is good; For his lovingkindness endureth for ever.
texts.19:118:14-14: Jehovah is my strength and song; And he is become my salvation.
texts.19:118:24-24: This is the day which Jehovah hath made; We will rejoice and be glad in it.
texts.19:118:6-6: Jehovah is on my side; I will not fear: What can man do unto me?
texts.19:119:105-105: NUN. Thy word is a lamp unto my feet, And light unto my path.
texts.19:119:11-11: Thy word have I laid up in my heart, That I might not sin against thee.
texts.19:119:114-114: Thou art my hiding-place and my shield: I hope in thy word.
texts.19:119:165-165: Great peace have they that love thy law; And they have no occasion of stumbling.
texts.19:119:50-50: This is my comfort in my affliction; For thy word hath quickened me.
texts.19:119:76-76: Let, I pray thee, thy lovingkindness be for my comfort, According to thy word unto thy servant.
texts.19:119:9-10: BETH. Wherewith shall a young man cleanse his way? By taking heed thereto according to thy word. With my whole heart have I sought thee: Oh let me not wander from thy commandments.
texts.19:121:1-2: I will lift up mine eyes unto the mountains: From whence shall my help come? My help cometh from Jehovah, Who made heaven and earth.
texts.19:121:7-8: Jehovah will keep thee from all evil; He will keep thy soul. Jehovah will keep thy going out and thy coming in From this time forth and for evermore. Psalm 122 A Song of Ascents; of David.
texts.19:124:8-8: Our help is in the name of Jehovah, Who made heaven and earth. Psalm 125 A Song of Ascents.
texts.19:125:1-2: They that trust in Jehovah Are as mount Zion, which cannot be moved, but abideth for ever. As the mountains are round about Jerusalem, So Jehovah is round about his people From this time forth and for evermore.
texts.19:126:3-3: Jehovah hath done great things for us, Whereof we are glad.
texts.19:126:5-6: They that sow in tears shall reap in joy. He that goeth forth and weepeth, bearing seed for sowing, Shall doubtless come again with joy, bringing his sheaves with him. Psalm 127 A Song of Ascents; of Solomon.
texts.19:127:1-2: Except Jehovah build the house, They labor in vain that build it: Except Jehovah keep the city, The watchman waketh but in vain. It is vain for you to rise up early, To take rest late, To eat the bread of toil; For so he giveth unto his beloved sleep.
texts.19:128:1-2: Blessed is every one that feareth Jehovah, That walketh in his ways. For thou shalt eat the labor of thy hands: Happy shalt thou be, and it shall be well with thee.
texts.19:13:5-6: But I have trusted in thy lovingkindness; My heart shall rejoice in thy salvation. I will sing unto Jehovah, Because he hath dealt bountifully with me. Psalm 14 For the Chief Musician. A Psalm of David.
texts.19:130:5-5: I wait for Jehovah, my soul doth wait, And in his word do I hope.
texts.19:130:7-7: O Israel, hope in Jehovah; For with Jehovah there is lovingkindness, And with him is plenteous redemption.
texts.19:131:2-2: Surely I have stilled and quieted my soul; Like a weaned child with his mother, Like a weaned child is my soul within me.
texts.19:133:1-1: Behold, how good and how pleasant it is For brethren to dwell together in unity!
texts.19:134:1-2: Behold, bless ye Jehovah, all ye servants of Jehovah, That by night stand in the house of Jehovah. Lift up your hands to the sanctuary, And bless ye Jehovah.
texts.19:135:3-3: Praise ye Jehovah; for Jehovah is good: Sing praises unto his name; for it is pleasant.
texts.19:136:1-1: Oh give thanks unto Jehovah; for he is good; For his lovingkindness endureth for ever.
texts.19:138:3-3: In the day that I called thou answeredst me, Thou didst encourage me with strength in my soul.
texts.19:138:8-8: Jehovah will perfect that which concerneth me: Thy lovingkindness, O Jehovah, endureth for ever; Forsake not the works of thine own hands. Psalm 139 For the Chief Musician. A Psalm of David.
texts.19:139:14-14: I will give thanks unto thee; for I am fearfully and wonderfully made: Wonderful are thy works; And that my soul knoweth right well.
texts.19:139:23-24: Search me, O God, and know my heart: Try me, and know my thoughts; And see if there be any wicked way in me, And lead me in the way everlasting. Psalm 140 For the Chief Musician. A Psalm of David.
texts.19:139:9-10: If I take the wings of the morning, And dwell in the uttermost parts of the sea; Even there shall thy hand lead me, And thy right hand shall hold me.
texts.19:141:3-3: Set a watch, O Jehovah, before my mouth; Keep the door of my lips.
texts.19:143:10-10: Teach me to do thy will; For thou art my God: Thy Spirit is good; Lead me in the land of uprightness.
texts.19:143:8-8: Cause me to hear thy lovingkindness in the morning; For in thee do I trust: Cause me to know the way wherein I should walk; For I lift up my soul unto thee.
texts.19:145:18-19: Jehovah is nigh unto all them that call upon him, To all that call upon him in truth. He will fulfil the desire of them that fear him; He also will hear their cry and will save them.
texts.19:145:3-3: Great is Jehovah, and greatly to be praised; And his greatness is unsearchable.
texts.19:145:8-9: Jehovah is gracious, and merciful; Slow to anger, and of great lovingkindness. Jehovah is good to all; And his tender mercies are over all his works.
texts.19:146:1-2: Praise ye Jehovah. Praise Jehovah, O my soul. While I live will I praise Jehovah: I will sing praises unto my God while I have any being.
texts.19:146:5-5: Happy is he that hath the God of Jacob for his help, Whose hope is in Jehovah his God:
texts.19:147:11-11: Jehovah taketh pleasure in them that fear him, In those that hope in his lovingkindness.
texts.19:147:3-3: He healeth the broken in heart, And bindeth up their wounds.
texts.19:147:4-5: He counteth the number of the stars; He calleth them all by their names. Great is our Lord, and mighty in power; His understanding is infinite.
texts.19:150:6-6: Let everything that hath breath praise Jehovah. Praise ye Jehovah.
texts.19:16:11-11: Thou wilt show me the path of life: In thy presence is fulness of joy; In thy right hand there are pleasures for evermore. Psalm 17 A Prayer of David.
texts.19:16:8-8: I have set Jehovah always before me: Because he is at my right hand, I shall not be moved.
texts.19:17:8-8: Keep me as the apple of the eye; Hide me under the shadow of thy wings,
texts.19:18:2-2: Jehovah is my rock, and my fortress, and my deliverer; My God, my rock, in whom I will take refuge; My shield, and the horn of my salvation, my high tower.
texts.19:19:1-1: The heavens declare the glory of God; And the firmament showeth his handiwork.
texts.19:19:14-14: Let the words of my mouth and the meditation of my heart Be acceptable in thy sight, O Jehovah, my rock, and my redeemer. Psalm 20 For the Chief Musician. A Psalm of David.
texts.19:20:7-7: Some trust in chariots, and some in horses; But we will make mention of the name of Jehovah our God.
texts.19:23:1-3: Jehovah is my shepherd; I shall not want. He maketh me to lie down in green pastures; He leadeth me beside still waters. He restoreth my soul: He guideth me in the paths of righteousness for his names sake.
texts.19:23:4-4: Yea, thou I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil; for thou art with me; Thy rod and thy staff, they comfort me.
texts.19:24:1-1: The earth is Jehovahs, and the fulness thereof; The world, and they that dwell therein.
texts.19:25:4-5: Show me thy ways, O Jehovah; Teach me thy paths. Guide me in thy truth, and teach me; For thou art the God of my salvation; For thee do I wait all the day.
texts.19:25:8-9: Good and upright is Jehovah: Therefore will he instruct sinners in the way. The meek will he guide in justice; And the meek will he teach his way.
texts.19:27:1-1: Jehovah is my light and my salvation; Whom shall I fear? Jehovah is the strength of my life; Of whom shall I be afraid?
texts.19:27:14-14: Wait for Jehovah: Be strong, and let thy heart take courage; Yea, wait thou for Jehovah. Psalm 28 A Psalm of David.
texts.19:27:4-4: One thing have I asked of Jehovah, that will I seek after; That I may dwell in the house of Jehovah all the days of my life, To behold the beauty of Jehovah, And to inquire in his temple.
texts.19:28:7-7: Jehovah is my strength and my shield; My heart hath trusted in him, and I am helped: Therefore my heart greatly rejoiceth; And with my song will I praise him.
texts.19:29:11-11: Jehovah will give strength unto his people; Jehovah will bless his people with peace. Psalm 30 A Psalm; a Song at the Dedication of the House. A Psalm of David.
texts.19:3:3-3: But thou, O Jehovah, art a shield about me; My glory and the lifter up of my head.
texts.19:30:11-12: Thou hast turned for me my mourning into dancing; Thou hast loosed my sackcloth, and girded me with gladness; To the end that my glory may sing praise to thee, and not be silent. O Jehovah my God, I will give thanks unto thee for ever. Psalm 31 For the Chief Musician. A Psalm of David.
texts.19:30:5-5: For his anger is but for a moment; His favor is for a life-time: Weeping may tarry for the night, But joy cometh in the morning.
texts.19:31:14-15: But I trusted in thee, O Jehovah: I said, Thou art my God. My times are in thy hand: Deliver me from the hand of mine enemies, and from them that persecute me.
texts.19:31:19-19: Oh how great is thy goodness, Which thou hast laid up for them that fear thee, Which thou hast wrought for them that take refuge in thee, Before the sons of men!
texts.19:31:24-24: Be strong, and let your heart take courage, All ye that hope in Jehovah. Psalm 32 A Psalm of David. Maschil.
texts.19:32:7-7: Thou art my hiding-place; thou wilt preserve me from trouble; Thou wilt compass me about with songs of deliverance. Selah
texts.19:32:8-8: I will instruct thee and teach thee in the way which thou shalt go: I will counsel thee with mine eye upon thee.
texts.19:33:20-21: Our soul hath waited for Jehovah: He is our help and our shield. For our heart shall rejoice in him, Because we have trusted in his holy name.
texts.19:33:22-22: Let thy lovingkindness, O Jehovah, be upon us, According as we have hoped in thee. Psalm 34 A Psalm of David; when he changed his behavior before Abimelech, who drove him away, and he departed.
texts.19:33:4-4: For the word of Jehovah is right; And all his work is done in faithfulness.
texts.19:34:1-1: I will bless Jehovah at all times: His praise shall continually be in my mouth.
texts.19:34:14-14: Depart from evil, and do good; Seek peace, and pursue it.
texts.19:34:18-18: Jehovah is nigh unto them that are of a broken heart, And saveth such as are of a contrite spirit.
texts.19:34:4-5: I sought Jehovah, and he answered me, And delivered me from all my fears. They looked unto him, and were radiant; And their faces shall never be confounded.
texts.19:34:8-8: Oh taste and see that Jehovah is good: Blessed is the man that taketh refuge in him.
texts.19:36:5-5: Thy lovingkindness, O Jehovah, is in the heavens; Thy faithfulness reacheth unto the skies.
texts.19:36:7-9: How precious is thy lovingkindness, O God! And the children of men take refuge under the shadow of thy wings. They shall be abundantly satisfied with the fatness of thy house; And thou wilt make them drink of the river of thy pleasures. For with thee is the fountain of life: In thy light shall we see light.
texts.19:37:23-24: A mans goings are established of Jehovah; And he delighteth in his way. Though he fall, he shall not be utterly cast down; For Jehovah upholdeth him with his hand.
texts.19:37:4-4: Delight thyself also in Jehovah; And he will give thee the desires of thy heart.
texts.19:37:5-6: Commit thy way unto Jehovah; Trust also in him, and he will bring it to pass. And he will make thy righteousness to go forth as the light, And thy justice as the noon-day.
texts.19:39:7-7: And now, Lord, what wait I for? My hope is in thee.
texts.19:4:8-8: In peace will I both lay me down and sleep; For thou, Jehovah, alone makest me dwell in safety. Psalm 5 For the Chief Musician; with the Nehiloth. A Psalm of David.
texts.19:40:1-3: I waited patiently for Jehovah; And he inclined unto me, and heard my cry. He brought me up also out of a horrible pit, out of the miry clay; And he set my feet upon a rock, and established my goings. And he hath put a new song in my mouth, even praise unto our God: Many shall see it, and fear, And shall trust in Jehovah.
texts.19:40:5-5: Many, O Jehovah my God, are the wonderful works which thou hast done, And thy thoughts which are to us-ward; They cannot be set in order unto thee; If I would declare and speak of them, They are more than can be numbered.
texts.19:42:1-2: As the hart panteth after the water brooks, So panteth my soul after thee, O God. My soul thirsteth for God, for the living God: When shall I come and appear before God?
texts.19:42:11-11: Why art thou cast down, O my soul? And why art thou disquieted within me? Hope thou in God; for I shall yet praise him, Who is the help of my countenance, and my God.
texts.19:46:1-2: God is our refuge and strength, A very present help in trouble. Therefore will we not fear, though the earth do change, And though the mountains be shaken into the heart of the seas;
texts.19:46:10-10: Be still, and know that I am God: I will be exalted among the nations, I will be exalted in the earth.
texts.19:48:14-14: For this God is our God for ever and ever: He will be our guide even unto death. Psalm 49 For the Chief Musician. A Psalm of the sons of Korah.
texts.19:5:3-3: O Jehovah, in the morning shalt thou hear my voice; In the morning will I order my prayer unto thee, and will keep watch.
texts.19:50:15-15: And call upon me in the day of trouble; I will deliver thee, and thou shalt glorify me.
texts.19:51:10-10: Create in me a clean heart, O God; And renew a right spirit within me.
texts.19:54:4-4: Behold, God is my helper: The Lord is of them that uphold my soul.
texts.19:55:22-22: Cast thy burden upon Jehovah, and he will sustain thee: He will never suffer the righteous to be moved.
texts.19:56:3-4: What time I am afraid, I will put my trust in thee. In God (I will praise his word), In God have I put my trust, I will not be afraid; What can flesh do unto me?
texts.19:57:9-10: I will give thanks unto thee, O Lord, among the peoples: I will sing praises unto thee among the nations. For thy lovingkindness is great unto the heavens, And thy truth unto the skies.
texts.19:59:16-16: But I will sing of thy strength; Yea, I will sing aloud of thy lovingkindness in the morning: For thou hast been my high tower, And a refuge in the day of my distress.
texts.19:61:2-3: From the end of the earth will I call unto thee, when my heart is overwhelmed: Lead me to the rock that is higher than I. For thou hast been a refuge for me, A strong tower from the enemy.
texts.19:62:1-2: My soul waiteth in silence for God only: From him cometh my salvation. He only is my rock and my salvation: He is my high tower; I shall not be greatly moved.
texts.19:62:5-6: My soul, wait thou in silence for God only; For my expectation is from him. He only is my rock and my salvation: He is my high tower; I shall not be moved.
texts.19:62:8-8: Trust in him at all times, ye people; Pour out your heart before him: God is a refuge for us. Selah
texts.19:63:3-4: Because thy lovingkindness is better than life, My lips shall praise thee. So will I bless thee while I live: I will lift up my hands in thy name.
texts.19:63:7-8: For thou hast been my help, And in the shadow of thy wings will I rejoice. My soul followeth hard after thee: Thy right hand upholdeth me.
texts.19:65:11-11: Thou crownest the year with thy goodness; And thy paths drop fatness.
texts.19:66:1-2: Make a joyful noise unto God, all the earth: Sing forth the glory of his name: Make his praise glorious.
texts.19:67:1-2: God be merciful unto us, and bless us, And cause his face to shine upon us; Selah That thy way may be known upon earth, Thy salvation among all nations.
texts.19:68:19-19: Blessed be the Lord, who daily beareth our burden, Even the God who is our salvation. Selah
texts.19:71:14-14: But I will hope continually, And will praise thee yet more and more.
texts.19:71:5-5: For thou art my hope, O Lord Jehovah: Thou art my trust from my youth.
texts.19:73:23-24: Nevertheless I am continually with thee: Thou hast holden my right hand. Thou wilt guide me with thy counsel, And afterward receive me to glory.
texts.19:73:26-26: My flesh and my heart faileth; But God is the strength of my heart and my portion for ever.
texts.19:77:11-12: I will make mention of the deeds of Jehovah; For I will remember thy wonders of old. I will meditate also upon all thy work, And muse on thy doings.
texts.19:8:3-4: When I consider thy heavens, the work of thy fingers, The moon and the stars, which thou hast ordained; What is man, that thou art mindful of him? And the son of man, that thou visitest him?
texts.19:84:11-11: For Jehovah God is a sun and a shield: Jehovah will give grace and glory; No good thing will he withhold from them that walk uprightly.
texts.19:85:8-8: I will hear what God Jehovah will speak; For he will speak peace unto his people, and to his saints: But let them not turn again to folly.
texts.19:86:15-15: But thou, O Lord, art a God merciful and gracious, Slow to anger, and abundant in lovingkindness and truth.
texts.19:86:5-5: For thou, Lord, art good, and ready to forgive, And abundant in lovingkindness unto all them that call upon thee.
texts.19:89:1-1: I will sing of the lovingkindness of Jehovah for ever: With my mouth will I make known thy faithfulness to all generations.
texts.19:9:1-1: I will give thanks unto Jehovah with my whole heart; I will show forth all thy marvellous works.
texts.19:9:9-10: Jehovah also will be a high tower for the oppressed, A high tower in times of trouble; And they that know thy name will put their trust in thee; For thou, Jehovah, hast not forsaken them that seek thee.
texts.19:90:12-12: So teach us to number our days, That we may get us a heart of wisdom.
texts.19:90:14-14: Oh satisfy us in the morning with thy lovingkindness, That we may rejoice and be glad all our days.
texts.19:90:17-17: And let the favor of the Lord our God be upon us; And establish thou the work of our hands upon us; Yea, the work of our hands establish thou it.
texts.19:91:1-2: He that dwelleth in the secret place of the Most High Shall abide under the shadow of the Almighty. I will say of Jehovah, He is my refuge and my fortress; My God, in whom I trust.
texts.19:91:11-11: For he will give his angels charge over thee, To keep thee in all thy ways.
texts.19:91:4-4: He will cover thee with his pinions, And under his wings shalt thou take refuge: His truth is a shield and a buckler.
texts.19:92:1-2: It is a good thing to give thanks unto Jehovah, And to sing praises unto thy name, O Most High; To show forth thy lovingkindness in the morning, And thy faithfulness every night,
texts.19:94:19-19: In the multitude of my thoughts within me Thy comforts delight my soul.
texts.19:95:1-2: Oh come, let us sing unto Jehovah; Let us make a joyful noise to the rock of our salvation. Let us come before his presence with thanksgiving; Let us make a joyful noise unto him with psalms.
texts.19:96:1-2: Oh sing unto Jehovah a new song: Sing unto Jehovah, all the earth. Sing unto Jehovah, bless his name; Show forth his salvation from day to day.
texts.19:97:11-11: Light is sown for the righteous, And gladness for the upright in heart.
texts.19:98:1-1: Oh sing unto Jehovah a new song; For he hath done marvellous things: His right hand, and his holy arm, hath wrought salvation for him.
texts.2:14:14-14: Jehovah will fight for you, and ye shall hold your peace.
texts.2:15:2-2: Jehovah is my strength and song, And he is become my salvation: This is my God, and I will praise him; My fathers God, and I will exalt him.
texts.2:33:14-14: And he said, My presence shall go with thee, and I will give thee rest.
texts.20:1:7-7: The fear of Jehovah is the beginning of knowledge; But the foolish despise wisdom and instruction.
texts.20:10:12-12: Hatred stirreth up strifes; But love covereth all transgressions.
texts.20:10:22-22: The blessing of Jehovah, it maketh rich; And he addeth no sorrow therewith.
texts.20:10:9-9: He that walketh uprightly walketh surely; But he that perverteth his ways shall be known.
texts.20:11:2-2: When pride cometh, then cometh shame; But with the lowly is wisdom.
texts.20:11:25-25: The liberal soul shall be made fat; And he that watereth shall be watered also himself.
texts.20:12:18-18: There is that speaketh rashly like the piercings of a sword; But the tongue of the wise is health.
texts.20:12:25-25: Heaviness in the heart of a man maketh it stoop; But a good word maketh it glad.
texts.20:13:12-12: Hope deferred maketh the heart sick; But when the desire cometh, it is a tree of life.
texts.20:13:20-20: Walk with wise men, and thou shalt be wise; But the companion of fools shall smart for it.
texts.20:14:26-26: In the fear of Jehovah is strong confidence; And his children shall have a place of refuge.
texts.20:14:29-29: He that is slow to anger is of great understanding; But he that is hasty of spirit exalteth folly.
texts.20:14:30-30: A tranquil heart is the life of the flesh; But envy is the rottenness of the bones.
texts.20:15:1-1: A soft answer turneth away wrath; But a grievous word stirreth up anger.
texts.20:15:13-13: A glad heart maketh a cheerful countenance; But by sorrow of heart the spirit is broken.
texts.20:15:23-23: A man hath joy in the answer of his mouth; And a word in due season, how good is it!
texts.20:15:30-30: The light of the eyes rejoiceth the heart; And good tidings make the bones fat.
texts.20:16:20-20: He that giveth heed unto the word shall find good; And whoso trusteth in Jehovah, happy is he.
texts.20:16:24-24: Pleasant words are as a honeycomb, Sweet to the soul, and health to the bones.
texts.20:16:3-3: Commit thy works unto Jehovah, And thy purposes shall be established.
texts.20:16:9-9: A mans heart deviseth his way; But Jehovah directeth his steps.
texts.20:17:17-17: A friend loveth at all times; And a brother is born for adversity.
texts.20:17:22-22: A cheerful heart is a good medicine; But a broken spirit drieth up the bones.
texts.20:18:10-10: The name of Jehovah is a strong tower; The righteous runneth into it, and is safe.
texts.20:18:24-24: He that maketh many friends doeth it to his own destruction; But there is a friend that sticketh closer than a brother.
texts.20:19:17-17: He that hath pity upon the poor lendeth unto Jehovah, And his good deed will he pay him again.
texts.20:19:21-21: There are many devices in a mans heart; But the counsel of Jehovah, that shall stand.
texts.20:2:6-6: For Jehovah giveth wisdom; Out of his mouth cometh knowledge and understanding:
texts.20:21:21-21: He that followeth after righteousness and kindness Findeth life, righteousness, and honor.
texts.20:22:1-1: A good name is rather to be chosen than great riches, And loving favor rather than silver and gold.
texts.20:24:14-14: So shalt thou know wisdom to be unto thy soul; If thou hast found it, then shall there be a reward, And thy hope shall not be cut off.
texts.20:24:3-4: Through wisdom is a house builded; And by understanding it is established; And by knowledge are the chambers filled With all precious and pleasant riches.
texts.20:25:11-11: A word fitly spoken Is like apples of gold in network of silver.
texts.20:27:17-17: Iron sharpeneth iron; So a man sharpeneth the countenance of his friend.
texts.20:28:13-13: He that covereth his transgressions shall not prosper: But whoso confesseth and forsaketh them shall obtain mercy.
texts.20:29:25-25: The fear of man bringeth a snare; But whoso putteth his trust in Jehovah shall be safe.
texts.20:3:13-13: Happy is the man that findeth wisdom, And the man that getteth understanding.
texts.20:3:24-24: When thou liest down, thou shalt not be afraid: Yea, thou shalt lie down, and thy sleep shall be sweet.
texts.20:3:3-4: Let not kindness and truth forsake thee: Bind them about thy neck; Write them upon the tablet of thy heart: So shalt thou find favor and good understanding In the sight of God and man.
texts.20:3:5-6: Trust in Jehovah with all thy heart, And lean not upon thine own understanding: In all thy ways acknowledge him, And he will direct thy paths.
texts.20:30:5-5: Every word of God is tried: He is a shield unto them that take refuge in him.
texts.20:31:25-25: Strength and dignity are her clothing; And she laugheth at the time to come.
texts.20:31:8-9: Open thy mouth for the dumb, In the cause of all such as are left desolate. Open thy mouth, judge righteously, And minister justice to the poor and needy.
texts.20:4:23-23: Keep thy heart with all diligence; For out of it are the issues of life.
texts.20:4:7-7: Wisdom is the principal thing; therefore get wisdom; Yea, with all thy getting get understanding.
texts.20:6:6-6: Go to the ant, thou sluggard; Consider her ways, and be wise:
texts.20:8:17-17: I love them that love me; And those that seek me diligently shall find me.
texts.20:9:10-10: The fear of Jehovah is the beginning of wisdom; And the knowledge of the Holy One is understanding.
texts.21:11:7-7: Truly the light is sweet, and a pleasant thing it is for the eyes to behold the sun.
texts.21:3:1-1: For everything there is a season, and a time for very purpose under heaven:
texts.21:3:11-11: He hath made everything beautiful in its time: also he hath set eternity in their heart, yet so that man cannot find out the work that God hath done from the beginning even to the end.
texts.21:4:9-10: Two are better than one, because they have a good reward for their labor. For if they fall, the one will lift up his fellow; but woe to him that is alone when he falleth, and hath not another to lift him up.
texts.21:7:8-8: Better is the end of a thing than the beginning thereof; and the patient in spirit is better than the proud in spirit.
texts.21:9:10-10: Whatsoever thy hand findeth to do, do it with thy might; for there is no work, nor device, nor knowledge, nor wisdom, in Sheol, whither thou goest.
texts.22:8:7-7: Many waters cannot quench love, Neither can floods drown it: If a man would give all the substance of his house for love, He would utterly be contemned.
texts.23:1:18-18: Come now, and let us reason together, saith Jehovah: though your sins be as scarlet, they shall be as white as snow; though they be red like crimson, they shall be as wool.
texts.23:12:2-2: Behold, God is my salvation; I will trust, and will not be afraid; for Jehovah, even Jehovah, is my strength and song; and he is become my salvation.
texts.23:25:1-1: O Jehovah, thou art my God; I will exalt thee, I will praise thy name; for thou hast done wonderful things, even counsels of old, in faithfulness and truth.
texts.23:26:3-3: Thou wilt keep him in perfect peace, whose mind is stayed on thee; because he trusteth in thee.
texts.23:26:4-4: Trust ye in Jehovah for ever; for in Jehovah, even Jehovah, is an everlasting rock.
texts.23:30:15-15: For thus said the Lord Jehovah, the Holy One of Israel, In returning and rest shall ye be saved; in quietness and in confidence shall be your strength. And ye would not:
texts.23:30:21-21: and thine ears shall hear a word behind thee, saying, This is the way, walk ye in it; when ye turn to the right hand, and when ye turn to the left.
texts.23:32:17-17: And the work of righteousness shall be peace; and the effect of righteousness, quietness and confidence for ever.
texts.23:33:2-2: O Jehovah, be gracious unto us; we have waited for thee: be thou our arm every morning, our salvation also in the time of trouble.
texts.23:35:4-4: Say to them that are of a fearful heart, Be strong, fear not: behold, your God will come with vengeance, with the recompense of God; he will come and save you.
texts.23:40:11-11: He will feed his flock like a shepherd, he will gather the lambs in his arm, and carry them in his bosom, and will gently lead those that have their young.
texts.23:40:29-29: He giveth power to the faint; and to him that hath no might he increaseth strength.
texts.23:40:31-31: but they that wait for Jehovah shall renew their strength; they shall mount up with wings as eagles; they shall run, and not be weary; they shall walk, and not faint.
texts.23:40:8-8: The grass withereth, the flower fadeth; but the word of our God shall stand forever.
texts.23:41:10-10: Fear thou not, for I am with thee; be not dismayed, for I am thy God; I will strengthen thee; yea, I will help thee; yea, I will uphold thee with the right hand of my righteousness.
texts.23:41:13-13: For I, Jehovah thy God, will hold thy right hand, saying unto thee, Fear not; I will help thee.
texts.23:42:3-3: A bruised reed will he not break, and a dimly burning wick will he not quench: he will bring forth justice in truth.
texts.23:43:1-1: But now thus saith Jehovah that created thee, O Jacob, and he that formed thee, O Israel: Fear not, for I have redeemed thee; I have called thee by thy name, thou art mine.
texts.23:43:18-19: Remember ye not the former things, neither consider the things of old. Behold, I will do a new thing; now shall it spring forth; shall ye not know it? I will even make a way in the wilderness, and rivers in the desert.
texts.23:43:2-2: When thou passest through the waters, I will be with thee; and through the rivers, they shall not overflow thee: when thou walkest through the fire, thou shalt not be burned, neither shall the flame kindle upon thee.
texts.23:44:22-22: I have blotted out, as a thick cloud, thy transgressions, and, as a cloud, thy sins: return unto me; for I have redeemed thee.
texts.23:45:22-22: Look unto me, and be ye saved, all the ends of the earth; for I am God, and there is none else.
texts.23:46:4-4: and even to old age I am he, and even to hoar hairs will I carry you; I have made, and I will bear; yea, I will carry, and will deliver.
texts.23:48:17-17: Thus saith Jehovah, thy Redeemer, the Holy One of Israel: I am Jehovah thy God, who teacheth thee to profit, who leadeth thee by the way that thou shouldest go.
texts.23:49:13-13: Sing, O heavens; and be joyful, O earth; and break forth into singing, O mountains: for Jehovah hath comforted his people, and will have compassion upon his afflicted.
texts.23:49:15-16: Can a woman forget her sucking child, that she should not have compassion on the son of her womb? yea, these may forget, yet will not I forget thee. Behold, I have graven thee upon the palms of my hands; thy walls are continually before me.
texts.23:50:4-4: The Lord Jehovah hath given me the tongue of them that are taught, that I may know how to sustain with words him that is weary: he wakeneth morning by morning, he wakeneth mine ear to hear as they that are taught.
texts.23:52:7-7: How beautiful upon the mountains are the feet of him that bringeth good tidings, that publisheth peace, that bringeth good tidings of good, that publisheth salvation, that saith unto Zion, Thy God reigneth!
texts.23:54:10-10: For the mountains may depart, and the hills be removed; but my lovingkindness shall not depart from thee, neither shall my covenant of peace be removed, saith Jehovah that hath mercy on thee.
texts.23:55:12-12: For ye shall go out with joy, and be led forth with peace: the mountains and the hills shall break forth before you into singing; and all the trees of the fields shall clap their hands.
texts.23:55:8-9: For my thoughts are not your thoughts, neither are your ways my ways, saith Jehovah. For as the heavens are higher than the earth, so are my ways higher than your ways, and my thoughts than your thoughts.
texts.23:57:15-15: For thus saith the high and lofty One that inhabiteth eternity, whose name is Holy: I dwell in the high and holy place, with him also that is of a contrite and humble spirit, to revive the spirit of the humble, and to revive the heart of the contrite.
texts.23:58:11-11: and Jehovah will guide thee continually, and satisfy thy soul in dry places, and make strong thy bones; and thou shalt be like a watered garden, and like a spring of water, whose waters fail not.
texts.23:60:1-1: Arise, shine; for thy light is come, and the glory of Jehovah is risen upon thee.
texts.23:61:3-3: to appoint unto them that mourn in Zion, to give unto them a garland for ashes, the oil of joy for mourning, the garment of praise for the spirit of heaviness; that they may be called trees of righteousness, the planting of Jehovah, that he may be glorified.
texts.23:64:8-8: But now, O Jehovah, thou art our Father; we are the clay, and thou our potter; and we all are the work of thy hand.
texts.23:65:24-24: And it shall come to pass that, before they call, I will answer; and while they are yet speaking, I will hear.
texts.23:66:13-13: As one whom his mother comforteth, so will I comfort you; and ye shall be comforted in Jerusalem.
texts.23:9:6-6: For unto us a child is born, unto us a son is given; and the government shall be upon his shoulder: and his name shall be called Wonderful, Counsellor, Mighty God, Everlasting Father, Prince of Peace.
texts.24:15:16-16: Thy words were found, and I did eat them; and thy words were unto me a joy and the rejoicing of my heart: for I am called by thy name, O Jehovah, God of hosts.
texts.24:17:7-8: Blessed is the man that trusteth in Jehovah, and whose trust Jehovah is. For he shall be as a tree planted by the waters, that spreadeth out its roots by the river, and shall not fear when heat cometh, but its leaf shall be green; and shall not be careful in the year of drought, neither shall cease from yielding fruit.
texts.24:24:7-7: And I will give them a heart to know me, that I am Jehovah: and they shall be my people, and I will be their God; for they shall return unto me with their whole heart.
texts.24:29:11-11: For I know the thoughts that I think toward you, saith Jehovah, thoughts of peace, and not of evil, to give you hope in your latter end.
texts.24:29:12-13: And ye shall call upon me, and ye shall go and pray unto me, and I will hearken unto you. And ye shall seek me, and find me, when ye shall search for me with all your heart.
texts.24:31:25-25: For I have satiated the weary soul, and every sorrowful soul have I replenished.
texts.24:31:3-3: Jehovah appeared of old unto me, saying, Yea, I have loved thee with an everlasting love: therefore with lovingkindness have I drawn thee.
texts.24:32:17-17: Ah Lord Jehovah! behold, thou hast made the heavens and the earth by thy great power and by thine outstretched arm; there is nothing too hard for thee,
texts.24:33:3-3: Call unto me, and I will answer thee, and will show thee great things, and difficult, which thou knowest not.
texts.25:3:22-23: It is of Jehovahs lovingkindnesses that we are not consumed, because his compassions fail not. They are new every morning; great is thy faithfulness.
texts.25:3:25-26: Jehovah is good unto them that wait for him, to the soul that seeketh him. It is good that a man should hope and quietly wait for the salvation of Jehovah.
texts.26:34:26-26: And I will make them and the places round about my hill a blessing; and I will cause the shower to come down in its season; there shall be showers of blessing.
texts.26:36:26-26: A new heart also will I give you, and a new spirit will I put within you; and I will take away the stony heart out of your flesh, and I will give you a heart of flesh.
texts.27:2:20-22: Daniel answered and said, Blessed be the name of God for ever and ever; for wisdom and might are his. And he changeth the times and the seasons; he removeth kings, and setteth up kings; he giveth wisdom unto the wise, and knowledge to them that have understanding; he revealeth the deep and secret things; he knoweth what is in the darkness, and the light dwelleth with him.
texts.28:10:12-12: Sow to yourselves in righteousness, reap according to kindness; break up your fallow ground; for it is time to seek Jehovah, till he come and rain righteousness upon you.
texts.28:14:5-6: I will be as the dew unto Israel; he shall blossom as the lily, and cast forth his roots as Lebanon. His branches shall spread, and his beauty shall be as the olive-tree, and his smell as Lebanon.
texts.28:6:3-3: And let us know, let us follow on to know Jehovah: his going forth is sure as the morning; and he will come unto us as the rain, as the latter rain that watereth the earth.
texts.29:2:13-13: and rend your heart, and not your garments, and turn unto Jehovah your God; for he is gracious and merciful, slow to anger, and abundant in lovingkindness, and repenteth him of the evil.
texts.29:2:21-21: Fear not, O land, be glad and rejoice; for Jehovah hath done great things.
texts.30:5:14-14: Seek good, and not evil, that ye may live; and so Jehovah, the God of hosts, will be with you, as ye say.
texts.32:2:7-7: When my soul fainted within me, I remembered Jehovah; And my prayer came in unto thee, into thy holy temple.
texts.33:6:8-8: He hath showed thee, O man, what is good; and what doth Jehovah require of thee, but to do justly, and to love kindness, and to walk humbly with thy God?
texts.33:7:7-7: But as for me, I will look unto Jehovah; I will wait for the God of my salvation: my God will hear me.
texts.33:7:8-8: Rejoice not against me, O mine enemy: when I fall, I shall arise; when I sit in darkness, Jehovah will be a light unto me.
texts.34:1:7-7: Jehovah is good, a stronghold in the day of trouble; and he knoweth them that take refuge in him.
texts.35:3:17-18: For though the fig-tree shall not flourish, Neither shall fruit be in the vines; The labor of the olive shall fail, And the fields shall yield no food; The flock shall be cut off from the fold, And there shall be no herd in the stalls: Yet I will rejoice in Jehovah, I will joy in the God of my salvation.
texts.35:3:19-19: Jehovah, the Lord, is my strength; And he maketh my feet like hinds feet, And will make me to walk upon my high places.
texts.36:3:17-17: Jehovah thy God is in the midst of thee, a mighty one who will save; he will rejoice over thee with joy; he will rest in his love; he will joy over thee with singing.
texts.37:2:4-4: Yet now be strong, O Zerubbabel, saith Jehovah; and be strong, O Joshua, son of Jehozadak, the high priest; and be strong, all ye people of the land, saith Jehovah, and work: for I am with you, saith Jehovah of hosts,
texts.38:4:6-6: Then he answered and spake unto me, saying, This is the word of Jehovah unto Zerubbabel, saying, Not by might, nor by power, but by my Spirit, saith Jehovah of hosts.
texts.38:8:16-16: These are the things that ye shall do: speak ye every man the truth with his neighbor; execute the judgment of truth and peace in your gates;
texts.4:6:24-26: Jehovah bless thee, and keep thee: Jehovah make his face to shine upon thee, and be gracious unto thee: Jehovah lift up his countenance upon thee, and give thee peace.
texts.40:10:29-31: Are not two sparrows sold for a penny? and not one of them shall fall on the ground without your Father: but the very hairs of your head are all numbered. Fear not therefore: ye are of more value than many sparrows.
texts.40:11:28-30: Come unto me, all ye that labor and are heavy laden, and I will give you rest. Take my yoke upon you, and learn of me; for I am meek and lowly in heart: and ye shall find rest unto your souls. For my yoke is easy, and my burden is light.
texts.40:13:44-44: The kingdom of heaven is like unto a treasure hidden in the field; which a man found, and hid; and in his joy he goeth and selleth all that he hath, and buyeth that field.
texts.40:17:20-20: And he saith unto them, Because of your little faith: for verily I say unto you, If ye have faith as a grain of mustard seed, ye shall say unto this mountain, Remove hence to yonder place; and it shall remove; and nothing shall be impossible unto you.
texts.40:18:20-20: For where two or three are gathered together in my name, there am I in the midst of them.
texts.40:19:26-26: And Jesus looking upon them said to them, With men this is impossible; but with God all things are possible.
texts.40:21:22-22: And all things, whatsoever ye shall ask in prayer, believing, ye shall receive.
texts.40:22:37-39: And he said unto him, Thou shalt love the Lord thy God with all thy heart, and with all thy soul, and with all thy mind. This is the great and first commandment. And a second like unto it is this, Thou shalt love thy neighbor as thyself.
texts.40:28:20-20: teaching them to observe all things whatsoever I commanded you: and lo, I am with you always, even unto the end of the world.
texts.40:5:14-16: Ye are the light of the world. A city set on a hill cannot be hid. Neither do men light a lamp, and put it under the bushel, but on the stand; and it shineth unto all that are in the house. Even so let your light shine before men; that they may see your good works, and glorify your Father who is in heaven.
texts.40:5:4-4: Blessed are they that mourn: for they shall be comforted.
texts.40:5:6-6: Blessed are they that hunger and thirst after righteousness: for they shall be filled.
texts.40:5:7-7: Blessed are the merciful: for they shall obtain mercy.
texts.40:5:8-8: Blessed are the pure in heart: for they shall see God.
texts.40:5:9-9: Blessed are the peacemakers: for they shall be called sons of God.
texts.40:6:14-14: For if ye forgive men their trespasses, your heavenly Father will also forgive you.
texts.40:6:21-21: for where thy treasure is, there will thy heart be also.
texts.40:6:25-26: Therefore I say unto you, be not anxious for your life, what ye shall eat, or what ye shall drink; nor yet for your body, what ye shall put on. Is not the life more than the food, and the body than the raiment? Behold the birds of the heaven, that they sow not, neither do they reap, nor gather into barns; and your heavenly Father feedeth them. Are not ye of much more value then they?
texts.40:6:33-33: But seek ye first his kingdom, and his righteousness; and all these things shall be added unto you.
texts.40:6:34-34: Be not therefore anxious for the morrow: for the morrow will be anxious for itself. Sufficient unto the day is the evil thereof.
texts.40:7:12-12: All things therefore whatsoever ye would that men should do unto you, even so do ye also unto them: for this is the law and the prophets.
texts.40:7:24-25: Every one therefore that heareth these words of mine, and doeth them, shall be likened unto a wise man, who built his house upon the rock: and the rain descended, and the floods came, and the winds blew, and beat upon that house; and if fell not: for it was founded upon the rock.
texts.40:7:7-8: Ask, and it shall be given you; seek, and ye shall find; knock, and it shall be opened unto you: for every one that asketh receiveth; and he that seeketh findeth; and to him that knocketh it shall be opened.
texts.41:11:24-24: Therefore I say unto you, All things whatsoever ye pray and ask for, believe that ye receive them, and ye shall have them.
texts.41:12:30-31: and thou shalt love the Lord thy God with all thy heart, and with all thy soul, and with all thy mind, and with all thy strength. The second is this, Thou shalt love thy neighbor as thyself. There is none other commandment greater than these.
texts.41:9:23-23: And Jesus said unto him, If thou canst! All things are possible to him that believeth.
texts.42:1:37-37: For no word from God shall be void of power.
texts.42:10:20-20: Nevertheless in this rejoice not, that the spirits are subject unto you; but rejoice that your names are written in heaven.
texts.42:11:9-10: And I say unto you, Ask, and it shall be given you; seek, and ye shall find; knock, and it shall be opened unto you. For every one that asketh receiveth; and he that seeketh findeth; and to him that knocketh it shall be opened.
texts.42:12:32-32: Fear not, little flock; for it is your Fathers good pleasure to give you the kingdom.
texts.42:12:6-7: Are not five sparrows sold for two pence? and not one of them is forgotten in the sight of God. But the very hairs of your head are all numbered. Fear not: ye are of more value than many sparrows.
texts.42:15:10-10: Even so, I say unto you, there is joy in the presence of the angels of God over one sinner that repenteth.
texts.42:6:36-36: Be ye merciful, even as your Father is merciful.
texts.42:6:38-38: give, and it shall be given unto you; good measure, pressed down, shaken together, running over, shall they give into your bosom. For with what measure ye mete it shall be measured to you again.
texts.43:1:5-5: And the light shineth in the darkness; and the darkness apprehended it not.
texts.43:10:10-10: The thief cometh not, but that he may steal, and kill, and destroy: I came that they may have life, and may have it abundantly.
texts.43:10:27-28: My sheep hear my voice, and I know them, and they follow me: and I give unto them eternal life; and they shall never perish, and no one shall snatch them out of my hand.
texts.43:11:25-26: Jesus said unto her, I am the resurrection, and the life: he that believeth on me, though he die, yet shall he live; and whosoever liveth and believeth on me shall never die. Believest thou this?
texts.43:12:46-46: I am come a light into the world, that whosoever believeth on me may not abide in the darkness.
texts.43:13:34-35: A new commandment I give unto you, that ye love one another; even as I have loved you, that ye also love one another. By this shall all men know that ye are my disciples, if ye have love one to another.
texts.43:14:1-1: Let not your heart be troubled: believe in God, believe also in me.
texts.43:14:18-18: I will not leave you desolate: I come unto you.
texts.43:14:27-27: Peace I leave with you; my peace I give unto you: not as the world giveth, give I unto you. Let not your heart be troubled, neither let it be fearful.
texts.43:14:6-6: Jesus saith unto him, I am the way, and the truth, and the life: no one cometh unto the Father, but by me.
texts.43:15:12-13: This is my commandment, that ye love one another, even as I have loved you. Greater love hath no man than this, that a man lay down his life for his friends.
texts.43:15:5-5: I am the vine, ye are the branches: He that abideth in me, and I in him, the same beareth much fruit: for apart from me ye can do nothing.
texts.43:15:9-11: Even as the Father hath loved me, I also have loved you: abide ye in my love. If ye keep my commandments, ye shall abide in my love; even as I have kept my Fathers commandments, and abide in his love. These things have I spoken unto you, that my joy may be in you, and that your joy may be made full.
texts.43:16:33-33: These things have I spoken unto you, that in me ye may have peace. In the world ye have tribulation: but be of good cheer; I have overcome the world.
texts.43:17:17-17: Sanctify them in the truth: thy word is truth.
texts.43:20:29-29: Jesus saith unto him, Because thou hast seen me, thou hast believed: blessed are they that have not seen, and yet have believed.
texts.43:3:16-16: For God so loved the world, that he gave his only begotten Son, that whosoever believeth on him should not perish, but have eternal life.
texts.43:4:14-14: but whosoever drinketh of the water that I shall give him shall never thirst; but the water that I shall give him shall become in him a well of water springing up unto eternal life.
texts.43:6:35-35: Jesus said unto them. I am the bread of life: he that cometh to me shall not hunger, and he that believeth on me shall never thirst.
texts.43:7:38-38: He that believeth on me, as the scripture hath said, from within him shall flow rivers of living water.

texts.66:21:5-5: And he that sitteth on the throne said, Behold, I make all things new. And he saith, Write: for these words are faithful and true.
texts.66:22:5-5: And there shall be night no more; and they need no light of lamp, neither light of sun; for the Lord God shall give them light: and they shall reign for ever and ever.
texts.66:3:20-20: Behold, I stand at the door and knock: if any man hear my voice and open the door, I will come in to him, and will sup with him, and he with me.
texts.8:1:16-16: And Ruth said, Entreat me not to leave thee, and to return from following after thee, for whither thou goest, I will go; and where thou lodgest, I will lodge; thy people shall be my people, and thy God my God;
texts.9:12:24-24: Only fear Jehovah, and serve him in truth with all your heart; for consider how great things he hath done for you.
texts.9:16:7-7: But Jehovah said unto Samuel, Look not on his countenance, or on the height of his stature; because I have rejected him: for Jehovah seeth not as man seeth; for man looketh on the outward appearance, but Jehovah looketh on the heart.
texts.9:2:2-2: There is none holy as Jehovah; For there is none besides thee, Neither is there any rock like our God.
